message:
chore(node): update beads issue tracker — bd-2fqyv.4.3 now in_progress

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -608,7 +608,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-2fqyv.4","title":"Replace incident sample events with real incident event sourcing","description":"Replace `incident bundle` generation from hard-coded sample events with a real incident event source. The audit showed that `main.rs` calls `sample_incident_events(&args.id)` before generating replay bundles, which means the command emits plausible but synthetic evidence.","design":"Define a real incident evidence pipeline:
- authoritative source for incident events and state snapshots
- explicit missing-data behavior
- deterministic fixture-only path for tests/examples
- bundle integrity checks that operate on real inputs rather than canned timelines","acceptance_criteria":"- `incident bundle` no longer uses sample events in its live path.
- Missing or malformed incident data causes clear failure.
- Tests/docs are updated to distinguish fixture mode from real mode.","notes":"This is a forensic surface; fake evidence is worse than no evidence. Prefer a hard error over fabricated timelines.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:19:21.292933448Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","updated_at":"2026-04-03T02:40:57.925247238Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["cli","incident","placeholder-remediation","replay"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2fqyv.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2fqyv","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:19:21.641835061Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2fqyv.4.1","title":"Define authoritative incident evidence source and validation contract","description":"Define the authoritative source contract for incident events, related state snapshots, and any metadata needed for replay bundle generation.","design":"Specify where the command loads incident evidence from, how that source is validated, and how deterministic fixtures are kept separate for tests and examples.","acceptance_criteria":"- Incident input contract is explicit and documented.
- Required fields and validation rules are defined.
- Fixture-only source is separated from the live source.","notes":"Think in terms of chain-of-custody: origin, validation, and reproducibility of incident evidence.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:19:22.019871702Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","updated_at":"2026-04-03T16:35:42.480102517Z","closed_at":"2026-04-03T16:35:42.480074444Z","close_reason":"Defined authoritative incident evidence package, validation, and fixture-boundary contract in docs/specs/section_10_5/bd-2fqyv_4_1_contract.md","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["evidence","incident","placeholder-remediation"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2fqyv.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2fqyv.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:19:24.838244886Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2fqyv.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2fqyv.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:19:22.326815825Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2fqyv.4.2","title":"Wire incident bundle CLI to real evidence sources and fail closed when absent","description":"Rewire the `incident bundle` command so it reads real incident evidence, validates it, and only then emits a replay bundle. Remove the sample-event live path.","design":"Make the command behavior binary: real evidence in, real bundle out; missing/invalid evidence, explicit failure. Preserve deterministic bundle generation once valid inputs exist.","acceptance_criteria":"- `main.rs` no longer calls `sample_incident_events()` in the live command path.
- Command failure modes for absent or invalid evidence are covered.
- Bundle generation remains deterministic for identical real inputs.","notes":"Keep any remaining sample helpers out of the production import graph.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:19:22.689646773Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","updated_at":"2026-04-03T17:09:33.687810633Z","closed_at":"2026-04-03T17:09:33.687786749Z","close_reason":"Validated incident bundle authoritative evidence path, fail-closed behavior, and stable-toolchain compatibility under rch verification","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["cli","incident","placeholder-remediation"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2fqyv.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2fqyv.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:19:22.993470352Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2fqyv.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2fqyv.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:19:26.299350406Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-2fqyv.4.3","title":"Quarantine incident sample fixtures and refresh bundle docs/tests","description":"Preserve deterministic examples by moving sample incident timelines into clearly test/fixture-only helpers and refreshing docs/tests around the new live behavior.","design":"Use fixtures intentionally: great for tests, unacceptable for live operator commands. Make that boundary obvious in naming, module placement, and docs.","acceptance_criteria":"- Sample incident helpers are test/fixture-scoped.
- Unit and incident bundle CLI/e2e tests show how to supply real incident inputs.
- Bundle contract tests no longer rely on live-path canned timelines.
- Logging/artifacts distinguish fixture timelines from authoritative incident evidence.","notes":"This bead protects developer ergonomics while keeping the production path honest.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:19:23.367224223Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","updated_at":"2026-04-03T02:39:23.580743909Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fixtures","incident","placeholder-remediation","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2fqyv.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2fqyv.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:19:23.666368232Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2fqyv.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2fqyv.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:19:26.585636346Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-2fqyv.4.3","title":"Quarantine incident sample fixtures and refresh bundle docs/tests","description":"Preserve deterministic examples by moving sample incident timelines into clearly test/fixture-only helpers and refreshing docs/tests around the new live behavior.","design":"Use fixtures intentionally: great for tests, unacceptable for live operator commands. Make that boundary obvious in naming, module placement, and docs.","acceptance_criteria":"- Sample incident helpers are test/fixture-scoped.
- Unit and incident bundle CLI/e2e tests show how to supply real incident inputs.
- Bundle contract tests no longer rely on live-path canned timelines.
- Logging/artifacts distinguish fixture timelines from authoritative incident evidence.","notes":"This bead protects developer ergonomics while keeping the production path honest.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:19:23.367224223Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","updated_at":"2026-04-03T17:11:52.679898847Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fixtures","incident","placeholder-remediation","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2fqyv.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2fqyv.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:19:23.666368232Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2fqyv.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2fqyv.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:19:26.585636346Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2fqyv.5","title":"Resolve control-plane service skeleton into a truthful transport surface","description":"Resolve the control-plane API surface so it no longer presents a skeleton as if it were a live service. The audit found that `api/service.rs` and `api/middleware.rs` explicitly describe a service skeleton, note the absence of a real transport boundary, and emit zeroed performance baselines.","design":"This branch must produce a truthful steady state, not just a renamed placeholder. That means either:
- implement the real transport/request-lifecycle/cancellation boundary, or
- explicitly quarantine non-live pieces so no operator-facing contract implies a running service that does not exist.

The branch should also eliminate fake perf baselines and replace them with measured or intentionally absent data.","acceptance_criteria":"- The service surface no longer claims more than it implements.
- Transport/lifecycle semantics are explicit.
- Performance baseline output is real or explicitly unavailable, never hard-coded zero placeholders.
- Related tests/docs/gates reflect the chosen architecture.","notes":"The core bug here is dishonesty in the surface contract. A truthful quarantine is acceptable as an interim step if it is explicit and removes any live-service illusion.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:20:37.918146281Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","updated_at":"2026-04-03T02:40:57.925712215Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["api","control-plane","placeholder-remediation"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2fqyv.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2fqyv","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:20:38.201553673Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2fqyv.5.1","title":"Choose and document the authoritative control-plane service boundary","description":"Decide and document the authoritative architecture for the control-plane service boundary: real transport implementation versus explicit internal/catalog-only quarantine. This decision needs to be made deliberately before code is refactored.","design":"Evaluate the current route metadata, middleware chain, cancellation expectations, telemetry model, and packaging surface. Then choose the architecture that best aligns with the project's real goals rather than preserving the current misleading middle state.","acceptance_criteria":"- Chosen service-boundary strategy is explicit.
- Interim and final truthfulness rules are documented.
- Follow-on implementation beads have clear scope.","notes":"Do not treat the current skeleton as a sacred baseline. If the right answer is to narrow the surface before expanding it, say so explicitly.

Implementation progress: `api/service.rs` now explicitly declares the surface as an in-process catalog/dispatch boundary rather than a live transport service, and endpoint reports now expose unavailable performance baselines with provenance instead of fake `0.0` values. Companion architecture/governance docs were updated to match that truth model.

Validation status: file-scoped `rustfmt --check crates/franken-node/src/api/service.rs` passes, but full `rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenengine-node --all-targets --features extended-surfaces` and targeted `rch exec -- cargo test ... endpoint_report_generation` are currently blocked by an unrelated syntax error in `/data/projects/franken_engine/crates/franken-engine/src/workload_policy_manifold.rs` plus unrelated `cargo fmt --check` drift elsewhere in the shared dirty worktree.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:20:38.564311121Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","updated_at":"2026-04-03T02:59:03.253448475Z","closed_at":"2026-04-03T02:59:03.253420543Z","close_reason":"Architecture chosen and truthfulness contract documented/implemented","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["api","architecture","placeholder-remediation"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2fqyv.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2fqyv.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:20:45.349913958Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2fqyv.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2fqyv.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:20:38.850395632Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2fqyv.5.2","title":"Implement the chosen transport/lifecycle strategy and remove ambiguous skeleton behavior","description":"Implement the selected service-boundary strategy from the architecture bead: either a real transport/request lifecycle/cancellation surface or an explicit quarantine of non-live assembly/catalog behavior.","design":"Any implementation here must align route metadata, middleware behavior, and runtime lifecycle semantics. Remove ambiguous middle states where the code looks like a live service but lacks the actual boundary behavior.","acceptance_criteria":"- Service implementation matches the chosen architecture.
- Misleading skeleton-only behavior is removed from live surfaces.
- Integration tests cover the resulting transport/truthfulness model.","notes":"Coordinate carefully with existing integration tests and any workflow gates that currently mention the skeleton.

Implementation progress: `api/service.rs` now exposes an explicit in-process catalog/dispatch boundary, carries transport-boundary metadata in endpoint reports, and no longer presents the surface as a live listener-owned service. Companion docs in `docs/architecture/` and `docs/governance/` were updated to match the chosen quarantine semantics.

Validation blocker: full `rch` cargo validation is currently blocked by unrelated shared-worktree issues outside this bead (syntax error in sibling `franken_engine` and unrelated formatting drift elsewhere in `franken_node`).","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:20:39.188875002Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","updated_at":"2026-04-03T02:59:03.309069567Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["api","implementation","placeholder-remediation"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2fqyv.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2fqyv.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:20:39.463099905Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2fqyv.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2fqyv.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:20:46.143842323Z","created_by":"CalmBarn","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
